manner: Carries the habits of a quota voice whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Soreheim Proper.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quota voice in and around Soreheim Proper, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Soreheim Proper while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to work shortfalls is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Proper: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue presents as someone shaped by the duties of a quota voice and the daily pressures of Soreheim Proper.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a quota voice, and proof that strangers will not make Soreheim Proper harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a quota voice too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue always knows more about Soreheim Proper than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to quota voice duties in Soreheim Proper.
social_texture: Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Soreheim Proper, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Quota touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Quota Voice Marrek Flinttongue when the party needs a socially grounded face for Soreheim Proper: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
